name: Doxycycline
executiveSummary: Long-half-life tetracycline; indicated for atypical pathogens, rickettsiae, and malaria prophylaxis.
indications:
## Indications

- Atypical pneumonia, rickettsiosis, borreliosis, brucellosis.
- Malaria prophylaxis (regimens).

## Precautions

- Avoid in children < 8 years old (dental staining) unless vital indication. Photosensitivity.

> Adjust per institutional protocol and medical prescription.

adulto.dose: 100 mg PO every 12 h or 200 mg loading dose on day 1.
adulto.administration: PO with water, in an upright position.

stability:
## Stability

- IV: protect from light; use promptly.
adverseEffects:
## Effects

- Nausea, photosensitivity, esophagitis if not swallowed with water.

bibliography.citation: ANMAT. Drug information and authorized prescribing information in Argentina.
Argentine Society of Infectious Diseases (SADI). Guidelines and consensus statements.
Infectious Diseases Society of America (IDSA). Clinical guidelines.
